THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: (1) THAT SFERS DISTRIBUTE THE MONTHLY SURVIVING SPOUSE ALLOWANCE TO RACHELE VAN PELT, SUBJECT TO ANNUAL COST OF LIVING ADJUSTMENTS; (2) THAT SFERS DISTRIBUTE THE CURRENT WITHHELD SURVIVING SPOUSE DISTRIBUTION ALLOWANCE TO RACHELE VAN PELT; (3) AND THAT SFERS DISTRIBUTE THE ENTIRE LUMP SUM DEATH BENEFIT TO RACHELE VAN PELT. (PLEASE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS).
